name: 文化交流
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 文明互鉴 / Civilizational Interaction / Civilizations
curriculum_points: Students will investigate how interaction between societies through trade, migration, or conquest leads to cultural diffusion and the exchange of ideas, arts, and innovations.
Learners will evaluate examples of cultural synthesis, demonstrating how elements from different cultures can combine to create new practices or forms of expression.
